title: clusia pusilla subsp. pusilla
intro: Clusia pusilla subsp. pusilla, also known as the Clusia minor or Small-leaved Clusia, is a plant species within the Clusia genus, typically found in the tropical rainforests of Central and South America. The Clusia pusilla subsp. pusilla has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant's extracts have been reported to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation and oxidative stress, as well as exhibiting antimicrobial and antifungal activities. Clusia pusilla subsp. pusilla can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used to support immune function and overall well-being.
